roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PTD PROGRESS REPORT: RESTITUTION /DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:PER PRETRIAL DIVERSION THERE OFFICE IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE RESTITUTION, DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ON PROBATION,/

/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/X AS TO COUNT 1 /CH1 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 13D/CTS 13/WS/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY THE PRETRIAL DIVERSION DEPARTMENT PLUS ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/X:AS TO COUNT 5:/CH5:CJ 13D/CTS:13/CCC:COUNTS 1 AND 5/VF2:140/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP//CONTD:PTD RESTITUTION ASSESSMENT RPT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) IS GRANTED,/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY ORALLY AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 5, A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OFHEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11350(B),/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:001 AND 005/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/

/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DEF: ADMONISHED TO COMPLY WITH REPORTING REQUIREMENTS THROUGH SPR, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO REPORT AS REQUIRED DEFENDANT WILLBE REMANDED,/DEF: ADVISED/VD: LAST DAY OF 02-19-13 (60TH DAY)/STWPX/DEF: REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION TO PARTICIPATE IN A DRUG DIVERSION PROGRAMIN COUNT 2,/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT(S) 2 CHARGING 11350(A) HEALTHAND SAFETY IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/PTDIV:03-01-13/X:COUNT(S) 1,3 AND 4 TRAILING SUCCESSFUL DIVERSION/CONTD: PRETRIAL DIVERSION ELIG ON COUNT 2 03-01-13 IN DEPT 12/DOPU: PRETRIAL DIVERSION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 02-19-13/OR/CTORD:AS CONDITION OF OR, DEFT TO CALL SPR 3 TIMES PER WEEK/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION RESTITUTION PROGRESS RPT/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:PTD/
